name: Collection page lets a user choose a companion pet
description: On the Collection page, the Companions grid shows self-hosted pet sprites that render as visible animated creatures (not broken-image placeholders), and clicking a companion selects it (the tile becomes visibly chosen). Regression coverage for the self-hosted sprite fix and the newly wired pet selection.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Navigate directly to the /app/collection page by URL

Verify the Companions section shows a grid of companion pet sprites that have rendered as visible pixel creatures (not broken-image icons or empty boxes), each with a name label such as Pikachu, Eevee, or Sylveon
Click one of the companion tiles (for example, the Eevee tile) to set it as the study companion
Verify the clicked companion becomes visibly selected — the tile shows an accent-colored highlight or a checkmark, and the helper text indicates a companion has been set
